title: X-Life FE
description: A remake of the popular YouTube SMP known as X-Life
body:
# X-Life Fabric Edition
X-Life FE is a Fabric version of the YouTube SMP known as X-Life! This modpack may not contain some of the mods you see in the YouTube videos due to rights & licensing issues or the mod not having the needed version, so instead of the missing mods I've found some other mods to "replace" them in the modpack instead!

Are you looking for an adventure? This is the modpack for you! The concept is simple. You start with one heart, every time you die, you gain a heart. Once you have 10 - which is your max hearts - and you die. You will not be able to respawn. So, you must be careful!

 
But of course, a bunch of extra mods are thrown in to make it more interesting. For example, some enchantments can go up to level 20, and you have better gear, tools, and a lot of extra building blocks to build your ultimate dream world!

- **Limited Lives-** With this pack you will have limited lives. You will start with one heart and each time you die you gain a heart. Once you die on 10 hearts you will not be able to respawn and will be put into spectator mode
  
- **High Enchantment Levels-** There are many new enchantments and the enchantment levels are much higher with some enchantments as high as level 20. The enchanting table even goes up to level 100! It will allow you to become more powerful and will help you adventure out and conquer the world of X-Life.
 
- **Many new building blocks-** Hundreds of new blocks are added with many colors and patterns. It brings many new options to builders and makes building much more fun and interesting. The possibilities are endless with this many blocks.
  
- **More animals and pets-** There are many animals and pets in this pack. Many are tamable but others can kill you. They all come with a unique flair and aesthetic. Your Minecraft world will feel much more lively.
  
- **Custom Biomes-** Many unique biomes are brought to your world. These new biomes are generated in the Overworld, the Nether, and the End! Each biome has many new plants, flowers, trees, building blocks, mobs, ores, and much more.
  
- **Better Tools and Armor-** Of course with many dangers you will need better tools and armor. There are many new tools added which can be crafted with a lot of different materials, there are even new types of tools. There are hammers and excavators which will break a 3x3 block area.

All Credits go to Respective mod teams/owners.
